---
title: "Donghai Wu"
subtitle: "Postdoc 2019–2022 · now Staff Scientist, South China Botanical Garden"
image: /images/portraits/donghai-wu.jpg
role: alumni
sort_key: 2022
details: "Postdoc 2019–2022; Now Staff Scientist, South China Botanical Garden"
aliases: ["Donghai Wu", "D. Wu", "D Wu"]
about:
  template: trestles
  image-shape: round
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: "mailto:dw623@cornell.edu"
    - icon: globe
      text: ResearchGate
      href: "https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Donghai-Wu"
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: "https://github.com/donghaiwu"
    - icon: twitter
      text: Twitter
      href: "https://twitter.com/DonghaiWuCarbon"
    - icon: record-circle
      text: ORCID
      href: "https://orcid.org/0000-0002-4638-3743"
    - icon: mortarboard
      text: Google Scholar
      href: "https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=ip05g0oAAAAJ"
---

I focus on providing insights into three scientific questions: (1) How to
quantify the destinies of the carbon atoms fixed by photosynthesis? (2) How does
the ecosystem respond to environmental change? (3) How to establish a positive
feedback between human and nature?
